user_id.description: The app user_id (AppUser.id) this subscription belongs to

endpoint.description: The push service endpoint URL for this subscription

p256dh_key.description: The p256dh public key from the PushSubscription.keys object

auth_key.description: The auth secret from the PushSubscription.keys object

user_agent.description: Browser/device user agent string at time of subscription (for debugging stale subscriptions)

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful push sent to this subscription
